subcodes.first_line: Glory be unto Thee, O my God! Thou beholdest me consumed with the fire of separation from Thee, after having drawn me unto Thy signs in the days of meeting with Thee [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحانک اللهم یا الهی ترانی مشتعلا بنار فراقک بعد ما جعلتنی منجذبا بایاتک فی ایام لقائک
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for the spiritual progress of others, @prayer for nearness to God, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
